curation_notes: Locations derived from the patch diff. The old `sub` function in executor/oci/spec.go performed naive path resolution via fs.RootPath without TOCTOU protection, allowing a race between path validation and mount. The `subMount` method in the same file called `sub` without caching submount references, so parallel build steps could trigger the race repeatedly. The patch moved `sub` to platform-specific files with fd-based verification and retry logic (Linux), added submount caching in `subMount`, and introduced a `ForceRemount` option in the snapshot package. 7 non-test source files were changed, so noisy_patch is true.
